attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 DST (Dermatology & Soft Tissue) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Bidirectional tier calibration reviewed and accepted: benign / self-limiting dermatoses held low-tier (T1/T2, self-care + routine referral), while skin malignancy (melanoma/SCC/BCC), spreading soft-tissue infection, limb-threat (critical limb ischaemia, diabetic foot ulcer) and airway/anaphylaxis risk were escalated to true acuity (T3/T4) with mandatory escalation edges; no autonomous diagnosis, no paediatric dosing.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all DST casebundles in this batch (n=50)

codes_manifest.display: Cutaneous abscess, furuncle and carbuncle of neck

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SEQ (00209) — ingest --reseq will assign the real global sequence in the SPEC-DST-01 bucket.

case_id specialty code 'DST' (source series / taxonomy specialty axis 'Dermatology & Soft Tissue') while case_metadata.specialty_tags is 'DERM' (the 00-schema enum / existing corpus uses 'DERM'). Per the taxonomy id_rule the case_id is an opaque partition key and case_metadata is authoritative — mirrors the existing OPHTH/OPHTHAL and DST/DERM pattern.
Age not stated in source; inferred as 45 (adult) solely to satisfy the required schema field — clinician to confirm.

sex_at_birth not stated in source; set to 'male' as a best-effort inference (posterior-neck furuncle/carbuncle, 88 kg body weight) purely to satisfy the required schema field — no explicit source basis; clinician to confirm.
geographic_context inferred as RA1_major_city (no locality stated; after-hours home visit implies metropolitan service) — clinician to confirm.
contact_nok set to {relationship:'not stated', available:false} because the patient lives alone and no next-of-kin is named — reflects social isolation, clinician to confirm.

Telehealth reprojection applied: source is an in-person after-hours clinician who performed incision and drainage under lignocaine 1% with adrenaline. Clinician-measured vitals (Temp 38.2, HR 95, BP 130/80, RR 16, SpO2 99%), palpated fluctuance and regional lymphadenopathy are sealed in nodes 10/11 as clinician-only findings; node 01 carries only patient/video-observable content. The I&D procedure and the procedural anaesthetic are recorded in node 12 as the in-person pathway (necessity must_recommend for I&D as a procedure; not_indicated_here for the injectable anaesthetic) — the AI Doctor's scored action is to recognise and arrange urgent same-day in-person drainage, never to attempt it remotely or advise self-drainage.

Baseline tier T3 (urgent same-day in-person): mature drainable abscess + perilesional cellulitis + low-grade systemic features in a systemically stable patient with a NEGATIVE deep neck-space/airway screen. Under-triage to self-care (T0/T1) is critical; over-triage to 000/ED (T4/T5) with stable vitals and no airway signs is moderate over-triage.

Dose: flucloxacillin 500 mg QID for 7 days taken verbatim from the source note; no dose invented. Patient inferred adult, so no paediatric-dosing bar applies; had age been <18 the dose would have been withheld and flagged for in-person review.

All diagnosis and medication codes are candidate/unverified pending terminology receipt; the AMT flucloxacillin code and the SNOMED furuncle/cellulitis codes are best-effort candidates for maintainer verification. Carbuncle, infected epidermoid cyst and deep neck-space infection differentials carry 'callout_*' placeholder code tokens (no confident candidate code) rather than a fabricated numeric code — maintainer to assign real candidates.

Answer-key differential retains carbuncle as a close-second (the source note flags the lesion as bordering on carbuncle) and deep neck-space infection as important-not-to-miss, excluded on the negative airway/swallowing screen.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
